nasb.text: With a leap he stood upright and began to walk; and he entered the temple with them, walking and leaping and praising God.

esv.text: And leaping up, he stood and began to walk, and entered the temple with them, walking and leaping and praising God.

cnv.text: 他一跳就站了起來，並且行走。他連走帶跳，讚美　神，同他們進入殿中。

ccb.text: 他跳了起来，站稳后开始行走，跟着彼得和约翰进入圣殿，走着跳着赞美上帝。

csbs.text: 他一跳，站了起来，并且行走，与他们一起进入圣殿，边走边跳，赞美神。
